query:
-- Usuários de teste
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_test_users FROM users 
WHERE email LIKE '%test%' 
   OR email LIKE '%@test.com%'
   OR name LIKE '%test%'
   OR name LIKE '%Test%'
   OR name LIKE '%_T_%'
   OR openId LIKE '%test%'
   OR openId LIKE '%_T_%';

-- Leads de teste  
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_test_leads FROM leads
WHERE email LIKE '%test%'
   OR email LIKE '%@test.com%'
   OR nome LIKE '%test%'
   OR nome LIKE '%Test%'
   OR nome LIKE '%_T_%'
   OR nome LIKE '%Lead Teste%';
